'''âs-ch-f''' ('''kasachaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pub|pub]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pub|pub]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-ch-f
|-
! Lemma
| kasachaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisachaf|thisachaf]] || [[word:jisachaf|jisachaf]] || [[word:shisachaf|shisachaf]] || [[word:kisachaf|kisachaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusachaf|thuthusachaf]] || [[word:jujusachaf|jujusachaf]] || [[word:shushusachaf|shushusachaf]] || [[word:kukusachaf|kukusachaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusachaf|thusachaf]] || [[word:jusachaf|jusachaf]] || [[word:shusachaf|shusachaf]] || [[word:kusachaf|kusachaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusachaf|thusachaf]] || [[word:jusachaf|jusachaf]] || [[word:shusachaf|shusachaf]] || [[word:kusachaf|kusachaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesachaf|thesachaf]] || [[word:jesachaf|jesachaf]] || [[word:shesachaf|shesachaf]] || [[word:kesachaf|kesachaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosachaf|thothosachaf]] || [[word:jojosachaf|jojosachaf]] || [[word:shoshosachaf|shoshosachaf]] || [[word:kokosachaf|kokosachaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosachaf|thosachaf]] || [[word:josachaf|josachaf]] || [[word:shosachaf|shosachaf]] || [[word:kosachaf|kosachaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosachaf|thosachaf]] || [[word:josachaf|josachaf]] || [[word:shosachaf|shosachaf]] || [[word:kosachaf|kosachaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚsachaf|thĂŚsachaf]] || [[word:jĂŚsachaf|jĂŚsachaf]] || [[word:shĂŚsachaf|shĂŚsachaf]] || [[word:kĂŚsachaf|kĂŚsachaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasachaf|thathasachaf]] || [[word:jajasachaf|jajasachaf]] || [[word:shashasachaf|shashasachaf]] || [[word:kakasachaf|kakasachaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasachaf|thasachaf]] || [[word:jasachaf|jasachaf]] || [[word:shasachaf|shasachaf]] || [[word:kasachaf|kasachaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasachaf|thasachaf]] || [[word:jasachaf|jasachaf]] || [[word:shasachaf|shasachaf]] || [[word:kasachaf|kasachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasachaf|shasachaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasachaf|goshasachaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasachaf|gokishasachaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasachafnĂź|shasachafnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasachafnknĂź|goshasachafnknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasachafnĂź|gokishasachafnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasachafshĂŤ|shasachafshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasachafnkshĂŤ|goshasachafnkshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasachafshĂŤ|gokishasachafshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasachafro|shasachafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasachafnkro|goshasachafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasachafro|gokishasachafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasachafmu|shasachafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasachafnkmu|goshasachafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasachafmu|gokishasachafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasachafsher|shasachafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasachafnksher|goshasachafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasachafsher|gokishasachafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasachafng|shasachafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasachafnkng|goshasachafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasachafng|gokishasachafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasachafya|shasachafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasachafnkya|goshasachafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasachafya|gokishasachafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasachafyam|shasachafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasachafnkyam|goshasachafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasachafyam|gokishasachafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasachafnĂźshĂŤ|shasachafnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasachafnknĂźshĂŤ|goshasachafnknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasachafnĂźshĂŤ|gokishasachafnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasachafnĂźro|shasachafnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasachafnknĂźro|goshasachafnknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasachafnĂźro|gokishasachafnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasachafnĂźmu|shasachafnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasachafnknĂźmu|goshasachafnknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasachafnĂźmu|gokishasachafnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasachafshĂŤnĂź|shasachafshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasachafnkshĂŤnĂź|goshasachafnkshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasachafshĂŤnĂź|gokishasachafshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasachafshĂŤro|shasachafshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasachafnkshĂŤro|goshasachafnkshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasachafshĂŤro|gokishasachafshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasachafshĂŤmu|shasachafshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasachafnkshĂŤmu|goshasachafnkshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasachafshĂŤmu|gokishasachafshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasachafronĂź|shasachafronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasachafnkronĂź|goshasachafnkronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasachafronĂź|gokishasachafronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasachafroshĂŤ|shasachafroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasachafnkroshĂŤ|goshasachafnkroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasachafroshĂŤ|gokishasachafroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasachafromu|shasachafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasachafnkromu|goshasachafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasachafromu|gokishasachafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasachafmunĂź|shasachafmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasachafnkmunĂź|goshasachafnkmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasachafmunĂź|gokishasachafmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasachafmushĂŤ|shasachafmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasachafnkmushĂŤ|goshasachafnkmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasachafmushĂŤ|gokishasachafmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasachafmuro|shasachafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasachafnkmuro|goshasachafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasachafmuro|gokishasachafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
